acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Rio Vista CA Police Department and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harrassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored in accordance with law.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
overview: Rio Vista CA Police Department uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising individual privacy. Rio Vista CA Police Department utilizes retroactive searches to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Rio Vista CA Police Department utilizes real-time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.
